hero.title: OEM & ODM Solutions
hero.description: OEM/ODM should not feel like a gamble. Buyers hesitate after missed deadlines, vague updates, and quality drift after the sample stage. Our program is built around clear checkpoints, documented revisions, and predictable execution - so you stay in control from prototype to mass production.

engagementModels.title: Engagement Models
engagementModels.description: Flexible ways to work with us, depending on your design readiness.

cards.title: OEM (Build-to-Print)
cards.description: You specify; we execute. Perfect for brands with existing designs needing manufacturing discipline.

cards.title: ODM (Design + Build)
cards.description: You select a base platform; we tailor appearance, specs, and packaging to make it yours.

cards.title: Hybrid
cards.description: Start from an existing design for speed, then evolve into deeper customization over time.

items.title: Private Label Programs
items.description: Logo application, retail packaging options, barcodes, inserts, QR cards, and listing-ready support.

items.title: Product Customization
items.description: Port mix, output tiers, materials and finish, structure options, and usability details.

items.title: Engineering Collaboration
items.description: DFM review, rapid prototyping, performance tuning, and failure-mode thinking.

items.title: Supply Chain & Cost Engineering
items.description: Multi-tier BOM options, packaging optimization, pricing ladders, and forecast-friendly replenishment.

items.title: Documentation & Compliance Planning
items.description: CE and RoHS readiness, FCC pathways, ISO 9001 aligned QMS documentation, and labeling planning.

items.title: Repeat-Order Stability
items.description: Revision control, aligned inspection standards, lot traceability, and locked packaging specs.

buyerWins.title: Where Buyers Win
buyerWins.description: You win when your SKU earns positive reviews, stays in stock, and scales without surprises.
items: Launch faster with prototyping support and practical engineering feedback
Reduce returns by addressing fit, heat, durability, and packaging protection up front
Protect brand reputation through consistent batches and controlled revisions
Build a long-term supply chain partner instead of switching factories

primary.title: Start an OEM/ODM RFQ
primary.description: Tell us your target market, quantity, and customization needs. We respond within 24 hours with a practical quote and clear next steps.

secondary.title: Request a Prototype Plan
secondary.description: Share your reference product and timeline. We propose the fastest path from sample to stable mass production.
